settings.heading: Handmade Beanies, Knitted One at a Time

settings.text: Warm, well-made, and genuinely handknitted in the UK. Every beanie is made individually on a Sentro knitting machine using premium wool blend yarn — not mass-produced, not shipped from a warehouse. From £15.

settings.caption: Handknitted in the UK
settings.heading: Made Properly, One at a Time
settings.text:
Every beanie is knitted individually on a Sentro circular knitting machine — not cut from a roll of fabric, not imported in bulk. The yarn is a premium wool blend chosen for warmth, softness, and durability. The kind of hat that keeps its shape and stays warm after years of use, not just one season.

Handmade means no two are identical. Small irregularities are part of the process — a sign that a person made it, not a machine in a factory.

settings.caption: Two Looks, One Hat
settings.heading: Fully Reversible Design
settings.text:
The reversible beanies give you two colourways in a single hat — wear it one way for a bold look, flip it for something more subtle. It's a practical detail that makes a real difference when you're deciding what to wear in a hurry.

Both sides are finished to the same standard, so there's no 'wrong' side. The seam is neat, the cuff sits well either way, and the hat holds its shape on both sides.

settings.caption: The Gift That Actually Gets Worn
settings.heading: A Handmade Gift Worth Giving
settings.text:
Handmade gifts land differently. People notice the quality — the weight of the yarn, the neat finish, the fact that someone's hands actually made it. A beanie is practical enough to use every day and personal enough to feel like it was chosen with care.

Beanies are posted in simple, sustainable packaging and can be sent directly to the recipient. Custom colour requests welcome — email Charliebthomas@icloud.com with your requirements. From £15.

settings.heading: What materials are used?
settings.row_content: The beanies are knitted using premium wool blend yarns — a mix of wool and acrylic that gives warmth and softness without being scratchy, and holds its shape wash after wash. No cheap filler yarns are used. Specific yarn information for any hat is available on request.

settings.heading: How do I wash my beanie?
settings.row_content: Hand wash in cool water and lay flat to dry for best results. Machine washing on a gentle, cool cycle is possible but may cause gradual shrinkage over time. Avoid tumble drying. Treat it well and it'll last for years.

settings.heading: Can I request a custom colour?
settings.row_content: Yes — custom colour requests are welcome, subject to yarn availability. Email Charliebthomas@icloud.com with your requirements and we'll confirm what's possible and any lead time. Great for sports teams, school colours, or a specific gift idea.

settings.heading: How long does delivery take?
settings.row_content: In-stock beanies are dispatched within 1–3 working days. Custom colour orders may take slightly longer depending on yarn availability — we'll confirm a timeline when you enquire. All orders are posted via Royal Mail with tracking available on request.

settings.heading: Do they make good gifts?
settings.row_content: Yes — handmade gifts land differently to something bought off a shelf. People notice the quality and the care that went into it. Beanies can be sent directly to the recipient in sustainable packaging. Just mention it at checkout or via email if you'd like a note included.
